name: ColdAltSpotStrategyAgent
description: Rule-based spot strategy for manually pre-screened cold altcoins using Bollinger, RSI, MTM, and ARBR resonance with strict staged exits.

metadata.author: OpenAI Codex
metadata.notes: Implements the user's cold altcoin spot-only iron-rule strategy. Fundamental and backing checks are assumed to be pre-screened manually before adding symbols.
